name: Diagnostic Aid Services
fullName: UI ~ Assistence - TM Medical record: Diagnostic Aid Services

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
Given the user chooses "UI_find_diagnostic_aid_service" in the tm medical record strategy
When the user finds the "<administration_billing_last_dx_service_name>" in diagnostic aid service
When the user adds to service a variable tm medical record strategy with:
